Tests the conversion of a large number to a string in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of JavaScript's `String` function when converting a large number to a string. It uses an `assert` statement to check if the conversion of the number `10000000000000000000` to a string results in the expected string value `"10000000000000000000"`. This test ensures that the `String` function correctly handles large numeric values without losing precision during the conversion process. The script is likely part of a larger test suite to validate JavaScript's type conversion functionalities.
